intended_use: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease.
intended_use_full: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease. In addition, it has the ability to provide Quality Score feedback.
target_condition: Cardiac disease suspected in patients undergoing echocardiography
ground_truth: Quality tagging by experienced sonographers (validation 1); ACEP score and clinical interpretability assessment by three expert cardiologists specializing in echocardiography (validation 2)
other_metrics: Overall agreement with experienced sonographer quality tagging: 77%; 85% of patients with ACEP quality score 3-5 achieved at least 'Medium' quality score by LVivo IQS; 92% of saved clips were clinically interpretable by expert cardiologists
